predictions.reasoning: DSGVO Art. 30 explicitly mandates a register (Verzeichnis) of all processing activities with specified contents including controller details, purposes, data categories, and technical/organizational measures; this application is the direct implementation artifact.

CRM stores personal data and marketing consents, thus constitutes a processing activity that must be documented in the Art. 30 register, though it is not the register itself but rather a subject system requiring documentation.
